name: six-thinking-hats-edward-de-bono
description: Edward de Bono's Six Thinking Hats — the parallel thinking framework that separates emotion from logic, creativity from information, and criticism from optimism.
useCase: Run better meetings, make better decisions, and generate creative ideas using structured parallel thinking.
knownRisks: Simple framework may be dismissed as too basic by those who prefer complexity
Requires discipline to use correctly — everyone must use each hat in sequence
Hats should not be used as personality labels
